title: chrome-devtools-axi: Agent-ergonomic browser automation
author: Kun Chen (kunchenguid)
content_summary: Reference implementation of AXI principles applied to browser automation. Wraps chrome-devtools-mcp internally but exposes a CLI surface with TOON-formatted output, unified action+snapshot commands, generation-prefixed element UIDs (stale-ref detection), and next-step hints. Beats raw MCP variants on cost while matching reliability.
key_points: Wraps chrome-devtools-mcp — so this is literally CLI-over-MCP as a usability fix
Generation-prefixed UIDs (e.g. @g1:1) prevent silent stale-ref failures
Every command output includes contextual next-step suggestions
Benchmark: 100% success @ $0.074 vs MCP 99-100% @ $0.091-0.120 per task
